name: Boeing Blue (Starliner IVA)
best_known_for: Boeing's blue IVA suit for the CST-100 Starliner, debuted on the Crew Flight Test 2024
credit: Lightweight launch-entry pressure suit built by David Clark for Boeing's commercial-crew vehicle. Touch-screen-compatible gloves, integrated communications cap, vented helmet. Worn on the Starliner Crew Flight Test (Wilmore and Williams, June–September 2024).
